title: Bridge Essay: Meditation and Self-transcendence: A Human Need?

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Meditation and Self-transcendence: A Human Need?** — Integr Psychol Behav Sci. PMID: 38877223. DOI: 10.1007/s12124-024-09848-6. Building on Fircks, who aims at integrating the theoretical and historical roots of mindfulness into psychology through abridge between Taoism, relying on the polarity of life and wu wei (the principle of not-forcing) and Mead's Social Psychology, this commentary seeks to further explore how mindfulness, meditation and self-transcendence plays arole in the personal needs hierarchy of the human organism. This is done in the framework of Abraham Maslow'stheory of human motivation and his
